name: GGG Technologies
description: UK specialist IT support and infrastructure provider for the hospitality industry. Serving hotels, boutique properties, luxury resorts and serviced apartments across London and the UK.

services.name: 24/7 IT Helpdesk
services.description: Round-the-clock remote IT support with guaranteed response times for hotels

services.name: IT Support & Maintenance
services.description: Proactive and reactive IT support and maintenance for hotel operations

services.name: On-Site IT Support
services.description: Engineer on-site visits across London and UK for hands-on IT resolution

services.name: Remote IT Support
services.description: Fast remote diagnostics and resolution without engineer callout

services.name: Guest WiFi
services.description: Enterprise-grade guest wireless networks with bandwidth management and captive portals

services.name: Network & WiFi Solutions
services.description: Full LAN/WLAN design, installation and ongoing management

services.name: Cabling Infrastructure
services.description: Structured cabling, Cat6/fibre optic, patch panels and cable management

services.name: Firewall & Security
services.description: Next-gen firewall configuration, VPN and perimeter network security

services.name: Cyber Security
services.description: Threat monitoring, vulnerability assessment, endpoint protection and staff training

services.name: PCI DSS Compliance
services.description: Hotel payment card industry compliance consulting and implementation

services.name: CCTV & Security Systems
services.description: IP camera systems, NVR/DVR installation and remote monitoring

services.name: Access Control
services.description: Key card, biometric and electronic door entry systems for hotels

services.name: PMS Hotel Systems
services.description: Property Management System setup, support, training and troubleshooting

services.name: PMS Integration
services.description: Integration of PMS with payment gateways, booking engines and EPOS systems

services.name: Smart Room Technology
services.description: Automated room controls, digital guest services and smart room systems

services.name: Digital Signage
services.description: In-lobby and in-room digital display and wayfinding systems

services.name: Voice Solutions
services.description: Hotel VOIP phone systems and front-desk telephony

services.name: IT Consultancy
services.description: Strategic IT planning, technology roadmaps and project management for hotels
